items.title: Score up to $893 bundled savings + price cuts on Lectric e-bikes during its Father’s Day Sale starting from $799
items.summary: Lectric has launched its Father’s Day e-bike Sale with up to $893 savings and 15% off accessories, with the main focus being on the Xpedition2 Cargo e-bikes that are getting the biggest savings. During this event, you can find the Xpedition2 Single-Battery e-bike with a $346 FREE bundle at $1,399 shipped, while the Xpedition2 Dual-Battery e-bike comes with a $744 FREE bundle at $1,799 shipped, and the Xpedition2 Long-Range Dual-Battery e-bike gets a $893 FREE bundle at $1,999 shipped. Normally these bundles would run for $1,745, $2,543, and $2,892 without the usual savings on the bundles, which are coming in as the biggest collective savings yet in 2026. These bundles are primarily focused on comfortable passenger-forward accessories, especially for parents who are in need of a new way to shepherd their kids around safely. Head below to check out the full lineup of offers across the brand’s entire fleet.

items.title: EcoFlow’s Early Prime Day Sale offers up to 62% power station discounts, bonus extra savings, free gifts, rewards, more from $149

One notable return during this sale gives you the tried-and-true DELTA Pro 3,600Wh Portable Power Station with 2x 220W solar panels at $2,041.55 shipped, after using the bonus savings code 26EFPDAFF at checkout. This package goes for $5,199 at full price, which we saw discounted furthest to $2,279 in 2025, and $2,149 in 2026, which was seen in last month’s EcoCredits Madness Sale for only a handful of days. Now, you’re getting a brand new all-time low price for this bundle with $3,057 savings. You can also find the station on its own for $1,614 shipped, using the above code, beating Amazon by $85, too. Head below to get the full rundown on extra savings during this sale, as well as to browse the full lineup of deals.

Now, you’re able to pick it up with a $20 markdown off the newer going rate ($50 off the original MSRP) for a new all-time low price. If you don’t mind a corded model, you can find the standard Little-Green deep cleaner down at $95 right now, while the corded Little-Green Mini is down at $80.

items.summary:

The departure of John Jumper, a key member of Google's AI coding development team, further strains Google's efforts to compete with Anthropic and OpenAI  —  Google DeepMind Vice President John Jumper, who won the 2024 Nobel Prize in chemistry for his work on artificial intelligence, is leaving the company to join Anthropic PBC.
